ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language(s) spoken in the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone(s) of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative division */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the division belongs to */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative division */,
  "division_code" TEXT /* Code for the administrative division */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the administrative division */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the administrative division */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the division */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the division */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the division data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_divisions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrative division the region belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES administrative_divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was reported */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalized cases */,
  "icu" INTEGER /* Number of cases in the ICU */,
  "ventilator" INTEGER /* Number of cases on ventilators */,
  "vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinations administered */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for better tracking */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for device and browser information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
